'''鈭歵-m-m-d''' ('''katammedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:phosphoribosylate|phosphoribosylate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-m-m-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:phosphoribosylate|phosphoribosylate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-m-m-d
|-
! Lemma
| katammedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitamedoko|thitamedoko]] || [[word:jitamedoko|jitamedoko]] || [[word:shitamedoko|shitamedoko]] || [[word:kitamedoko|kitamedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutamedoko|thuthutamedoko]] || [[word:jujutamedoko|jujutamedoko]] || [[word:shushutamedoko|shushutamedoko]] || [[word:kukutamedoko|kukutamedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutamedoko|thutamedoko]] || [[word:jutamedoko|jutamedoko]] || [[word:shutamedoko|shutamedoko]] || [[word:kutamedoko|kutamedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutamedoko|thutamedoko]] || [[word:jutamedoko|jutamedoko]] || [[word:shutamedoko|shutamedoko]] || [[word:kutamedoko|kutamedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetamedoko|thetamedoko]] || [[word:jetamedoko|jetamedoko]] || [[word:shetamedoko|shetamedoko]] || [[word:ketamedoko|ketamedoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotamedoko|thotamedoko]] || [[word:jotamedoko|jotamedoko]] || [[word:shotamedoko|shotamedoko]] || [[word:kotamedoko|kotamedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotamedoko|thotamedoko]] || [[word:jotamedoko|jotamedoko]] || [[word:shotamedoko|shotamedoko]] || [[word:kotamedoko|kotamedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙tamedoko|th忙tamedoko]] || [[word:j忙tamedoko|j忙tamedoko]] || [[word:sh忙tamedoko|sh忙tamedoko]] || [[word:k忙tamedoko|k忙tamedoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatamedoko|thatamedoko]] || [[word:jatamedoko|jatamedoko]] || [[word:shatamedoko|shatamedoko]] || [[word:katamedoko|katamedoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
